name: sales-instajet
description: InstaJet.io platform help — Instagram Stories influencer marketplace, campaign setup, influencer discovery (10K+ vetted creators, 50+ countries), payment processing (escrow, cards, crypto), analytics, and managed service options. Use when InstaJet campaign setup is confusing, can't find the right influencers in the marketplace, pricing or escrow payment flow is unclear, approval workflow isn't moving forward, analytics don't reflect actual story views, or unsure if InstaJet is better than other influencer marketplaces. Do NOT use for influencer marketing strategy across platforms (use /sales-influencer-marketing), TikTok influencer campaigns (use /sales-tiktok-marketing), gaming influencer marketing (use /sales-gaming-marketing), or general creator discovery workflow (use /sales-influencer-marketing).
